arts.ttl: Gabriel response to Erling Haaland incident ridicules Arsenal reaction to Man City celebrations
arts.sum: Gabriel Magalhaes has broken his silence on the incident which saw Erling Haaland throw a ball at his head in the aftermath of Manchester City's late equaliser vs Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright brands Erling Haaland a COWARD for Man City vs Arsenal antics
arts.sum: Ian Wright thought Erling Haaland "was better than that" after throwing the ball at the back of Gabriel's head after Manchester City's 98th-minute equaliser against Arsenal

arts.ttl: WATCH: Erling Haaland engages in war of words with Mikel Arteta and Gabriel Jesus
arts.sum: "What what what what?" Haaland responds, to which Jesus answers: "Why you saying, you talking?" "Come," Jesus says as he turns Haaland away from the Arsenal boss.

arts.ttl: 3 things we learned from Man City's 2-2 draw with Arsenal
arts.sum: Thanks to last season's extremely boring games between Arsenal and Manchester City, it's fair to say that we weren't expecting much from the clash on Sunday evening. For the first time since Arsenal began to challenge Man City for the Premier League title, a game between the sides had a genuinely big fight feel about it with plenty of needle, plenty of argy-bargy and plenty of drama.

arts.ttl: Rodri knee injury: Man City 'discover' how long star midfielder will be ruled out for
arts.sum: Man City midfielder Rodri will reportedly miss the rest of the season after rupturing his anterior cruciate ligament in Sunday's 2-2 Premier League draw with Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: 'Brains of a rocking horse': Richard Keys brutally slams Arsenal player after Man City draw
I saw what Arsenal staff really thought about Man City as they left the Etihad amid Bernardo jibes
arts.sum: Manchester City and Arsenal took part in a feisty 2-2 draw in the Premier League in a contest not short of talking points.

arts.ttl: Man City left Alan Shearer 'surprised' with three failings in draw with 10-man Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester City were held to a 2-2 draw by Arsenal on Saturday afternoon and while Pep Guardiola's side showed their character, they also lacked in a few areas, according to Alan Shearer

arts.ttl: Ian Wright blasts Erling Haaland for ‘coward’s move’ in heated Arsenal incident
arts.sum: Haaland and Gabriel were involved in a long-running battle at the Emirates and emotions spilled over when Manchester City equalised

arts.ttl: Former Celtic, Manchester City and Hertha Berlin defender sent to train with Club Brugge’s second team
arts.sum: Het Nieuwsblad are reporting that Club Brugge defender Dedryck Boyata has been sent to train with Club NXT, the sides youth development squad that plays in the Belgian second tier.…
